meaning: adj.无声息的,喘不过气来的,气喘吁吁的,停止呼吸的,死的
examples: Colin was heaving with great breathless sobs.
He arrived breathless at the top of the stairs.
I was a little breathless and my heartbeat was bumpy and fast.
Rouse's malls in its fancy "planned communities" win breathless praise from architecture and urban planning critics.
During this long, breathless, disjointed speech, Hadley had been staring at Anton Kruppev in astonishment.
